name: Path Control Game
description: Path Control is a popular and free online game for boys, in which you need to rotate the platforms to help the circle get to the basket. Meanwhile, you also need to watch the thorns at any time, they can be controlled. If you act wisely, you can quickly move to the next level and improve your reflexes! I guess it's easy for you. Are you ready to try it now?
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Ball, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Physics, Platform, Puzzle
